{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Process Engineer",
  "description": "Siperco Nigeria Limited is currently&nbsp;recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Process&nbsp;Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
Process Design &amp; Engineering:


	Develop and review Process Flow Diagrams (PFDs), Piping &amp; Instrumentation Diagrams (P&amp;IDs), Heat and Material Balances (HMBs), and Process Design Basis documents.
	Perform process simulations, hydraulic calculations, and equipment sizing using industry-standard software.
	Prepare process datasheets and technical specifications for process equipment.
	Develop process philosophies, operating procedures, and design calculations.
	Ensure process designs meet safety, operability, reliability, and environmental requirements.


Process Optimization:


	Analyze plant performance and identify opportunities to improve efficiency, product quality, energy consumption, and throughput.
	Monitor key process parameters and recommend corrective actions to optimize production.
	Support troubleshooting of process upsets and operational challenges.
	Conduct debottlenecking studies and recommend process improvements.


Equipment &amp; System Engineering:
Provide process engineering support for:


	Reactors
	Distillation Columns
	Heat Exchangers
	Pumps and Compressor


Procurement &amp; Vendor Support:


	Prepare process equipment specifications and material requisitions.
	Review vendor technical proposals and process calculations.
	Participate in technical bid evaluations (TBEs).
	Resolve technical queries from suppliers and contractors.
	Review vendor documentation for compliance with project requirements.
	Participate in plant performance testing and acceptance activities.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Chemical Engineering or Process Engineering.
	10&ndash;12 years of experience in process engineering .


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hrsiperco@gmail.com using the Job position as the subject of the mail.",

Process Engineer Job at Siperco Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Siperco Nigeria Limited is currently recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Process Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
Process Design & Engineering:
     

            
    




	Develop and review Process Flow Diagrams (PFDs), Piping & Instrumentation Diagrams (P&IDs), Heat and Material Balances (HMBs), and Process Design Basis documents.
	Perform process simulations, hydraulic calculations, and equipment sizing using industry-standard software.
	Prepare process datasheets and technical specifications for process equipment.
	Develop process philosophies, operating procedures, and design calculations.
	Ensure process designs meet safety, operability, reliability, and environmental requirements.


Process Optimization:


	Analyze plant performance and identify opportunities to improve efficiency, product quality, energy consumption, and throughput.
	Monitor key process parameters and recommend corrective actions to optimize production.
	Support troubleshooting of process upsets and operational challenges.
	Conduct debottlenecking studies and recommend process improvements.


Equipment & System Engineering:
Provide process engineering support for:


	Reactors
	Distillation Columns
	Heat Exchangers
	Pumps and Compressor


Procurement & Vendor Support:


	Prepare process equipment specifications and material requisitions.
	Review vendor technical proposals and process calculations.
	Participate in technical bid evaluations (TBEs).
	Resolve technical queries from suppliers and contractors.
	Review vendor documentation for compliance with project requirements.
	Participate in plant performance testing and acceptance activities.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree in Chemical Engineering or Process Engineering.
	10–12 years of experience in process engineering .


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Talent Acquisition Assistant (NYSC)",
  "description": "Jodazen Integrated Services is a trusted partner for businesses and individuals seeking seamless HR and travel solutions.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:&nbsp;

&nbsp;Job Position: Talent Acquisition Assistant (NYSC)

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: NYSC
Department:&nbsp;&nbsp;Human Resources &ndash; Recruitment
Reports To: Talent Acquisition Lead / HR Manager

About the Role


	We are seeking a proactive, resourceful, and career-driven NYSC Corps Member to join our team as a Talent Acquisition Assistant. This is a remote opportunity designed for individuals passionate about recruitment and talent management.
	The successful candidate will support end-to-end recruitment activities, including candidate sourcing, screening, interview coordination, and talent database management.
	This role offers hands-on HR experience and an excellent opportunity to build a career in Talent Acquisition.


Key Responsibilities


	Source candidates using job boards, LinkedIn, social media, referrals, and other recruitment channels.
	Screen CVs and shortlist qualified candidates based on job requirements.
	Conduct initial phone screenings and schedule interviews.
	Coordinate interviews between candidates and hiring managers.
	Prepare interview schedules, recruitment reports, and candidate profiles.
	Follow up with candidates throughout the recruitment process.
	Assist in drafting and posting job advertisements on various recruitment platforms.
	Build and maintain a pipeline of qualified candidates for current and future vacancies.
	Ensure a positive candidate experience throughout the hiring process.
	Perform other recruitment and HR-related duties as assigned.


Requirements


	Must be a currently serving NYSC Corps Member (Corper).
	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or HND in Human Resource Management, Industrial Relations, Psychology, Business Administration, or a related discipline.
	Strong interest in Talent Acquisition and Recruitment.
	Must own a functional laptop and have reliable internet access.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Good organizational and time management skills.
	Ability to work independently in a remote environment.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Word, Excel, and Google Workspace is an added advantage.
	Previous internship or volunteer HR experience is an added advantage.


Required Competencies:


	Candidate Sourcing
	CV Screening
	Interview Coordination
	Communication &amp; Interpersonal Skills
	Time Management
	Attention to Detail
	Confidentiality
	Problem Solving
	Teamwork
	Ability to Multitask.


What We Offer


	Monthly Allowance
	Attractive Commission on every successful recruitment placement
	Hands-on recruitment and HR experience
	Mentorship from experienced HR professionals
	Opportunity for career growth and future employment based on performance
	Flexible remote working environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: jodazenintegratedservices@gmail.com using &quot;Application &ndash; Talent Acquisition Assistant (NYSC)&quot; as the subject of the email.&nbsp;",

Talent Acquisition Assistant (NYSC) Job at Jodazen Integrated Services




        
    

        
        Jodazen Integrated Services is a trusted partner for businesses and individuals seeking seamless HR and travel solutions.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below: 

 Job Position: Talent Acquisition Assistant (NYSC)

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: NYSC
Department:  Human Resources – Recruitment
Reports To: Talent Acquisition Lead / HR Manager

About the Role
     

            
    




	We are seeking a proactive, resourceful, and career-driven NYSC Corps Member to join our team as a Talent Acquisition Assistant. This is a remote opportunity designed for individuals passionate about recruitment and talent management.
	The successful candidate will support end-to-end recruitment activities, including candidate sourcing, screening, interview coordination, and talent database management.
	This role offers hands-on HR experience and an excellent opportunity to build a career in Talent Acquisition.


Key Responsibilities


	Source candidates using job boards, LinkedIn, social media, referrals, and other recruitment channels.
	Screen CVs and shortlist qualified candidates based on job requirements.
	Conduct initial phone screenings and schedule interviews.
	Coordinate interviews between candidates and hiring managers.
	Prepare interview schedules, recruitment reports, and candidate profiles.
	Follow up with candidates throughout the recruitment process.
	Assist in drafting and posting job advertisements on various recruitment platforms.
	Build and maintain a pipeline of qualified candidates for current and future vacancies.
	Ensure a positive candidate experience throughout the hiring process.
	Perform other recruitment and HR-related duties as assigned.


Requirements


	Must be a currently serving NYSC Corps Member (Corper).
	Bachelor's Degree or HND in Human Resource Management, Industrial Relations, Psychology, Business Administration, or a related discipline.
	Strong interest in Talent Acquisition and Recruitment.
	Must own a functional laptop and have reliable internet access.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Good organizational and time management skills.
	Ability to work independently in a remote environment.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Word, Excel, and Google Workspace is an added advantage.
	Previous internship or volunteer HR experience is an added advantage.


Required Competencies:


	Candidate Sourcing
	CV Screening
	Interview Coordination
	Communication & Interpersonal Skills
	Time Management
	Attention to Detail
	Confidentiality
	Problem Solving
	Teamwork
	Ability to Multitask.


What We Offer


	Monthly Allowance
	Attractive Commission on every successful recruitment placement
	Hands-on recruitment and HR experience
	Mentorship from experienced HR professionals
	Opportunity for career growth and future employment based on performance
	Flexible remote working environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Application – Talent Acquisition Assistant (NYSC)" as the subject of the email.     

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",

  "title": "Senior Electrical Engineer",
  "description": "Siperco Nigeria Limited is currently&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:&nbsp;

&nbsp;Job Position: Senior&nbsp;Electrical Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose


	The Electrical Engineer is responsible for the design, specification, procurement support, installation, testing, commissioning, and maintenance of electrical systems for an Ethane-to-Polymers (E2P) plant.
	The role ensures all electrical systems are safe, reliable, energy-efficient, and compliant with project specifications, international standards, and regulatory requirements throughout the project lifecycle.


Key Responsibilities
Electrical Engineering &amp; Design:


	Develop and review electrical design documents, calculations, and technical specifications.
	Prepare and review single-line diagrams (SLDs), load lists, cable schedules, cable routing layouts, lighting layouts, earthing and lightning protection drawings.
	Perform electrical load flow, short-circuit, motor starting, voltage drop, and protection coordination studies.
	Design and review power distribution systems for process plants.
	Ensure compliance with project specifications, client requirements, and applicable engineering standards.


Power Generation &amp; Distribution:
Provide engineering support for:


	High Voltage (HV), Medium Voltage (MV), and Low Voltage (LV) systems.
	Electrical substations and switchgear.
	Transformers.
	Motor Control Centers (MCCs).
	Variable Frequency Drives (VFDs).
	Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) systems


Equipment &amp; Vendor Management:


	Prepare electrical equipment specifications and material requisitions.
	Conduct Technical Bid Evaluations (TBEs) and review vendor proposals.
	Review vendor drawings, calculations, and technical documentation.


Construction, Installation &amp; Commissioning:


	Provide technical support during installation and construction activities.
	Review construction method statements and installation procedures.
	Support pre-commissioning, commissioning, energization, and plant start-up activities.


Maintenance &amp; Reliability:


	Support preventive, predictive, and corrective maintenance strategies.
	Conduct root cause analysis (RCA) for electrical failures.
	Recommend improvements to enhance electrical system reliability and efficiency.
	Monitor equipment performance and lifecycle requirements.


Documentation:
Prepare and review:


	Single-Line Diagrams (SLDs)
	Electrical Load Lists
	Cable Schedules
	Equipment Datasheets
	Technical Specifications
	Protection Coordination Studies


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Electrical Engineering.
	10&ndash;15 years of experience in electrical engineering.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hrsiperco@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Senior Electrical Engineer Job at Siperco Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Siperco Nigeria Limited is currently  recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below: 

 Job Position: Senior Electrical Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose
     

            
    




	The Electrical Engineer is responsible for the design, specification, procurement support, installation, testing, commissioning, and maintenance of electrical systems for an Ethane-to-Polymers (E2P) plant.
	The role ensures all electrical systems are safe, reliable, energy-efficient, and compliant with project specifications, international standards, and regulatory requirements throughout the project lifecycle.


Key Responsibilities
Electrical Engineering & Design:


	Develop and review electrical design documents, calculations, and technical specifications.
	Prepare and review single-line diagrams (SLDs), load lists, cable schedules, cable routing layouts, lighting layouts, earthing and lightning protection drawings.
	Perform electrical load flow, short-circuit, motor starting, voltage drop, and protection coordination studies.
	Design and review power distribution systems for process plants.
	Ensure compliance with project specifications, client requirements, and applicable engineering standards.


Power Generation & Distribution:
Provide engineering support for:


	High Voltage (HV), Medium Voltage (MV), and Low Voltage (LV) systems.
	Electrical substations and switchgear.
	Transformers.
	Motor Control Centers (MCCs).
	Variable Frequency Drives (VFDs).
	Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) systems


Equipment & Vendor Management:


	Prepare electrical equipment specifications and material requisitions.
	Conduct Technical Bid Evaluations (TBEs) and review vendor proposals.
	Review vendor drawings, calculations, and technical documentation.


Construction, Installation & Commissioning:


	Provide technical support during installation and construction activities.
	Review construction method statements and installation procedures.
	Support pre-commissioning, commissioning, energization, and plant start-up activities.


Maintenance & Reliability:


	Support preventive, predictive, and corrective maintenance strategies.
	Conduct root cause analysis (RCA) for electrical failures.
	Recommend improvements to enhance electrical system reliability and efficiency.
	Monitor equipment performance and lifecycle requirements.


Documentation:
Prepare and review:


	Single-Line Diagrams (SLDs)
	Electrical Load Lists
	Cable Schedules
	Equipment Datasheets
	Technical Specifications
	Protection Coordination Studies


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree in Electrical Engineering.
	10–15 years of experience in electrical engineering.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal Assistant (P.A) to the Managing Director",
  "description": "Vodstra Limited - Our client is a leading publicly listed company (PLC) specializing in the leasing and management of earth-moving equipment, serving the construction, mining, oil &amp; gas, infrastructure, and industrial sectors across Nigeria.&nbsp;

They are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Personal Assistant (P.A) to the Managing Director

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Transport &amp; Logistics

Description


	As the business continues to grow, we are seeking an exceptionally organized, discreet, and highly proactive male Personal Assistant to the Managing Director.
	This is a strategic role that requires an individual who can anticipate needs, manage competing priorities, coordinate executive activities, and ensure the Managing Director operates at maximum effectiveness.
	The ideal candidate is an experienced executive support professional who thrives in a fast-paced corporate environment and possesses excellent communication, organizational, and stakeholder management skills.


Key Responsibilities
The successful candidate will:


	Provide high-level executive and administrative support to the Managing Director.
	Manage the MD&#39;s complex calendar, appointments, meetings, and travel schedules to maximize productivity.
	Coordinate Board, Executive Management, and stakeholder meetings, including preparation of agendas, briefing materials, presentations, and minutes.
	Prepare high-quality reports, business correspondence, speeches, presentations, and confidential documents.
	Screen, prioritize, and manage incoming correspondence, calls, and requests, ensuring timely follow-up and resolution.
	Act as the primary liaison between the Managing Director and internal departments, Board members, shareholders, government agencies, regulators, clients, and business partners.
	Monitor and follow up on strategic initiatives, ensuring decisions and action points are implemented within agreed timelines.
	Coordinate local and international travel, logistics, accommodation, visas, and itineraries.
	Maintain strict confidentiality in handling sensitive corporate information and executive communications.
	Organize executive meetings, conferences, and corporate events.
	Track deadlines, commitments, and key business deliverables while proactively reminding the MD of critical priorities.
	Support investor relations, corporate governance, and Board Secretariat activities where required.
	Maintain an efficient document management and filing system for executive records.
	Undertake research and prepare briefing notes on business, industry, regulatory, and market developments.
	Perform other strategic assignments as may be delegated by the Managing Director.


Qualifications &amp; Experience
The ideal candidate should possess:


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Law, Management, Secretarial Administration, Economics, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 7 years of experience, with at least 3 years supporting a Chief Executive Officer, Managing Director, or Executive Director in a reputable organization.
	A Master&#39;s degree or MBA will be an added advantage.
	Professional certification (ICSAN, NIM, CIPM, PMP, or related qualifications) is desirable.
	Previous experience in a PLC, engineering, construction, equipment leasing, infrastructure, manufacturing, or oil &amp; gas company is highly preferred.
	Male candidates are prefered.


Required Competencies:
The successful candidate must demonstrate:


	Exceptional organizational and time-management skills.
	Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.
	Strong business writing and report preparation skills.
	High level of professionalism, discretion, and integrity.
	Ability to manage multiple priorities under pressure.
	Strong interpersonal and stakeholder management skills.
	Excellent planning, coordination, and follow-through capabilities.
	High attention to detail and accuracy.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook) and virtual collaboration tools.


Why Join Us?


	Opportunity to work directly with a high-performing executive leadership team.
	Competitive remuneration and executive benefits package.
	Exposure to strategic decision-making and corporate governance.
	Professional growth within a dynamic, publicly listed organization.
	A challenging and rewarding environment where excellence, accountability, and innovation are valued.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications to: info@vodstra.com using&nbsp; the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-31",

Personal Assistant (P.A) to the Managing Director Job at Vodstra Limited




        
    

        
        Vodstra Limited - Our client is a leading publicly listed company (PLC) specializing in the leasing and management of earth-moving equipment, serving the construction, mining, oil & gas, infrastructure, and industrial sectors across Nigeria. 

They are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Personal Assistant (P.A) to the Managing Director

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Transport & Logistics

Description
     

            
    




	As the business continues to grow, we are seeking an exceptionally organized, discreet, and highly proactive male Personal Assistant to the Managing Director.
	This is a strategic role that requires an individual who can anticipate needs, manage competing priorities, coordinate executive activities, and ensure the Managing Director operates at maximum effectiveness.
	The ideal candidate is an experienced executive support professional who thrives in a fast-paced corporate environment and possesses excellent communication, organizational, and stakeholder management skills.


Key Responsibilities
The successful candidate will:


	Provide high-level executive and administrative support to the Managing Director.
	Manage the MD's complex calendar, appointments, meetings, and travel schedules to maximize productivity.
	Coordinate Board, Executive Management, and stakeholder meetings, including preparation of agendas, briefing materials, presentations, and minutes.
	Prepare high-quality reports, business correspondence, speeches, presentations, and confidential documents.
	Screen, prioritize, and manage incoming correspondence, calls, and requests, ensuring timely follow-up and resolution.
	Act as the primary liaison between the Managing Director and internal departments, Board members, shareholders, government agencies, regulators, clients, and business partners.
	Monitor and follow up on strategic initiatives, ensuring decisions and action points are implemented within agreed timelines.
	Coordinate local and international travel, logistics, accommodation, visas, and itineraries.
	Maintain strict confidentiality in handling sensitive corporate information and executive communications.
	Organize executive meetings, conferences, and corporate events.
	Track deadlines, commitments, and key business deliverables while proactively reminding the MD of critical priorities.
	Support investor relations, corporate governance, and Board Secretariat activities where required.
	Maintain an efficient document management and filing system for executive records.
	Undertake research and prepare briefing notes on business, industry, regulatory, and market developments.
	Perform other strategic assignments as may be delegated by the Managing Director.


Qualifications & Experience
The ideal candidate should possess:


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Law, Management, Secretarial Administration, Economics, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 7 years of experience, with at least 3 years supporting a Chief Executive Officer, Managing Director, or Executive Director in a reputable organization.
	A Master's degree or MBA will be an added advantage.
	Professional certification (ICSAN, NIM, CIPM, PMP, or related qualifications) is desirable.
	Previous experience in a PLC, engineering, construction, equipment leasing, infrastructure, manufacturing, or oil & gas company is highly preferred.
	Male candidates are prefered.


Required Competencies:
The successful candidate must demonstrate:


	Exceptional organizational and time-management skills.
	Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.
	Strong business writing and report preparation skills.
	High level of professionalism, discretion, and integrity.
	Ability to manage multiple priorities under pressure.
	Strong interpersonal and stakeholder management skills.
	Excellent planning, coordination, and follow-through capabilities.
	High attention to detail and accuracy.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook) and virtual collaboration tools.


Why Join Us?


	Opportunity to work directly with a high-performing executive leadership team.
	Competitive remuneration and executive benefits package.
	Exposure to strategic decision-making and corporate governance.
	Professional growth within a dynamic, publicly listed organization.
	A challenging and rewarding environment where excellence, accountability, and innovation are valued.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications to: [email protected] using  the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Accountant Job at Cuanu Consult Limited




        
    

        
        Cuanu Consult Limited - Our client, an ISO Accredited Medical Diagnostic Centre (Laboratory & Imaging Services) providing laboratory and imaging investigations is seeking a highly competent candidate to establish and manage its finance function in the capacity below:

 Job Position: Accountant 

Job Location: Mainland, Lagos 
Job Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	This is an exciting opportunity for a proactive finance professional to build sound financial systems and ensure regulatory compliance within a fast-growing healthcare organisation.


Job Description
     

            
    




	Establish and maintain an effective accounting and financial reporting system.
	Prepare monthly Income Statements, Cash Flow Statements, and Financial Reports.
	Prepare management accounts and financial performance reports.
	Conduct monthly inventory verification of laboratory reagents, consumables, imaging supplies, and other inventory items.
	Reconcile cash, bank transfers, POS payments, and other collections daily and monthly.
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly revenue reconciliation reports.
	Develop and implement an appropriate costing structure for laboratory and imaging investigations.
	Monitor operational costs and recommend cost-saving initiatives.
	Process payroll and statutory deductions.
	Handle remittance and filing of VAT, PAYE, Pension, WHT, NSITF, NHF, and other applicable statutory obligations.
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations and internal controls.
	Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning.
	Coordinate external audits and maintain proper financial documentation.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related discipline.
	2-3years of accounting experience, preferably within the healthcare sector.
	Experience in financial reporting, taxation, inventory management, and internal controls.
	Good understanding of accounting standards and financial compliance requirements.


Skills Set:


	Strong financial reporting and accounting skills.
	Excellent knowledge of Nigerian tax regulations and statutory compliance.
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel.
	Strong reconciliation and analytical skills.
	Inventory management and stock control experience.
	Budget preparation and financial forecasting.
	Cost accounting and pricing analysis.
	Attention to detail and high level of integrity.
	Excellent organisational and time management skills.
	Ability to work independently and meet reporting deadlines.


Salary


	N300,000 per month.


Benefits:


	HMO
	Pension.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should their Cover Letter (written in the body of the email) stating why they are suitable for the role; Include their Full Name and WhatsApp Number in the cover letter and attach their CV in PDF format only to: [email protected] using "Accountant ISO Lab (for Accountant applicants)" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
